task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "推荐适合的音频处理工具"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "导入音频文件到编辑器中"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "选中背景噪音片段以捕捉噪声样本"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "应用降噪效果到整个音频"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "调整音频音量以避免爆音"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "导出处理后的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "弹出文件选择对话框以选择音频文件"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "读取音频文件数据"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "计算音频的RMS值（音量强度）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "估算音频的信噪比（SNR）"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "判断音频是否清晰"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "chooseTool"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "importAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "applyNoiseReduction"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "adjustVolume"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "exportAudio"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "selectAudioFile"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "readAudioData"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "calculateRMS"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "estimateSNR"}]}
